name: Bran Muffins-- Best Ever!
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 4-5 cups of cheap Miller's bran (US $0.29 per pound), 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and 2 1/2 teaspoons baking soda.
2. Add 1 cup raisins, apricots (dried) or blueberries, and 1 cup walnuts to the bran mixture.
3. Pour the batter into a greased muffin tin.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes, until golden brown.
